name: com.guffeyholdings/token-oracle
description: Returns real-time cost estimates and model recommendations for LLM API calls. Compares pricing across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and open-source providers. Helps agents optimize spend and stay within budget constraints.

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_ORACLE_BASE_URL
environment_variables.description: Optional override for the hosted TokenOracle MCP endpoint

environment_variables.name: TOKEN_ORACLE_SUBJECT
environment_variables.description: Optional end-user subject forwarded to the hosted service
